leakage_audit.note_zh: 错误句子本身作为 trace 内容出现，这是被审计对象；error_span/support_span/manual_correction 不进入 prompt。

model_spec.loader_risk: smoke_passed_current_env; use four-GPU HF device_map=auto for official hidden-state/verifier experiments
model_spec.notes: Z.ai/GLM recent 30B-A3B flash candidate; downloaded via hf-mirror on 2026-04-28. E62 passed license, tokenizer/chat-template, AutoConfig, HF dynamic option-logprob, hidden-state output, layer discovery, and vLLM static checks; admitted into expanded P0 evidence for E63 replication.

scope_note_en: E60 compares pointwise process-verifier prompts from plain to stricter inspection prompts, plus sibling comparison. Prompts contain only problem and trace(s), never manual labels or error spans.
scope_note_zh: E60 比较从普通到更严格检查的单点过程 verifier prompt，并加入 sibling comparison。prompt 只包含题目和 trace，不包含人工标签或错误 span。
